name: model-picker-animated
title: Model Picker Animated
author: d3serve Labs
description: Motion-powered drop-in Model Picker variant with animated model width, capability slots, and control layout changes.

meta.motion: This item installs motion and uses motion/react for control layout, slot, and label width animation.
meta.target: Drop-in replacement for model-picker. Install one of model-picker or model-picker-animated.

docs: Install this instead of model-picker when you want the animated implementation. It uses the same ModelPicker API and installs to the same @ui/model-picker.tsx target, but adds Motion-powered layout and width animation. It composes shadcn dropdown-menu and tooltip registry dependencies so Base UI and Radix projects keep their chosen primitive stack.
